lines.english: Why do people think the writer is mad?
lines.chinese: 为什么人们认为这位作者疯了？
lines.raw: Why do people think the writer is mad? | 为什么人们认为这位作者疯了？

lines.english: Aeroplanes are slowly driving me mad.
lines.chinese: 飞机正慢慢地把我逼疯。
lines.raw: Aeroplanes are slowly driving me mad. | 飞机正慢慢地把我逼疯。

lines.english: I live near an airport and passing planes can be heard night and day.
lines.chinese: 我住在一个机场附近，飞机从早到晚轰鸣而过。
lines.raw: I live near an airport and passing planes can be heard night and day. | 我住在一个机场附近，飞机从早到晚轰鸣而过。

lines.english: The airport was built years ago, but for some reason it could not be used then.
lines.chinese: 机场是多年前修建的，但由于某种原因，那时无法投入使用。
lines.raw: The airport was built years ago, but for some reason it could not be used then. | 机场是多年前修建的，但由于某种原因，那时无法投入使用。

lines.english: Last year, however, it came into use.
lines.chinese: 然而，去年它投入使用了。
lines.raw: Last year, however, it came into use. | 然而，去年它投入使用了。

lines.english: Over a hundred people must have been driven away from their homes by the noise.
lines.chinese: 一百多人一定是被噪音逼离了家园。
lines.raw: Over a hundred people must have been driven away from their homes by the noise. | 一百多人一定是被噪音逼离了家园。

lines.english: I am one of the few people left.
lines.chinese: 我是少数留下来的人之一。
lines.raw: I am one of the few people left. | 我是少数留下来的人之一。

lines.english: Sometimes I think this house will be knocked down by a passing plane.
lines.chinese: 有时我想这房子会被一架路过的飞机撞倒。
lines.raw: Sometimes I think this house will be knocked down by a passing plane. | 有时我想这房子会被一架路过的飞机撞倒。

lines.english: I have been offered a large sum of money to go away, but I am determined to stay here.
lines.chinese: 有人给我一大笔钱让我搬走，但我决心留在这里。
lines.raw: I have been offered a large sum of money to go away, but I am determined to stay here. | 有人给我一大笔钱让我搬走，但我决心留在这里。

lines.english: Everybody says I must be mad and they are probably right.
lines.chinese: 大家都说我一定疯了，他们可能是对的。
lines.raw: Everybody says I must be mad and they are probably right. | 大家都说我一定疯了，他们可能是对的。
